title: Build a Month-End Reconciliation Procedure
summary: Write the month-end reconciliation POLICY (the why), then assemble the PROCEDURE (the how) from a six-category checklist (Document Gathering, Transaction Processing, Reconciliation, Documentation & Filing, Reporting, Review & Handoff). Live preview composes a finished, peer-runnable procedure document.

Apply the 7 Rules to create a documented, repeatable procedure for your playbook

💡 Sample Reference: Real-World Monthly Reconciliation Checklist

This is from a real accounting firm's playbook. Use it as inspiration!

  1. Check Dext for documents
  2. Publish the receipts into QBO from Dext
  3. Match the transactions in QBO
  4. Reconcile the bank accounts
  5. Bookmark statements with proper naming convention
  6. Ensure documents are stamped with date and time
  7. Mark period, account number, ending balance in red
  8. Generate AP/AR Aging, BS, GL, P&L, Reconciliation reports
  9. Check vendor statements against QBO entries
  10. Check uncleared transactions and note reasons
  11. Check balance sheet for abnormal balances
  12. Post queries in question tab with reference number
  13. Mark reference documents in blue for queries
  14. Save documents in query folder
  15. Move task to review or post questions if open items exist

📋 Step 1: Define the POLICY (The WHY)

Edit the sample policy below to match your firm's standards, or write your own from scratch:

💡 Tip: The policy gives the REASON and GOAL. Without it, team members can't recognize when the procedure no longer fits the goal. Customize this policy to reflect your firm's specific standards and client expectations.

📝 Step 2: Select & Build the PROCEDURE (The HOW)

📥 Document Gathering 0
Check document capture app (Dext/Hubdoc/MakersHub) for pending receipts
Download bank statements from online banking portal
Download credit card statements
Request any missing vendor invoices from client
⚙️ Transaction Processing 0
Publish receipts from capture app to GL
Match bank feed transactions in GL
Categorize any uncategorized transactions
Enter any manual transactions not in feeds
Check vendor statements against GL entries
✅ Reconciliation 0
Reconcile all bank accounts to statements
Reconcile all credit card accounts
Check for uncleared transactions and note reasons
Review balance sheet accounts for abnormal balances
Verify loan account balances match lender statements
📁 Documentation & Filing 0
Save statements with proper naming convention (YYYY-MM_Account_Statement)
Mark period, account number, and ending balance on statements
Stamp documents with date and time of entry
File all source documents in client DMS folder
📊 Reporting 0
Generate and save AP Aging Summary
Generate and save AR Aging Summary
Generate and save Balance Sheet
Generate and save Profit & Loss
Generate and save General Ledger
Generate and save Reconciliation Report
🔍 Review & Handoff 0
Post any queries in workflow with reference number, date, amount
Mark query documents in blue for easy identification
Save query items in designated query folder
Move task to "BK Review" if no questions, or "Questions Posted" if open items
Notify reviewer that reconciliation is ready for review

➕ Add Your Own Custom Step
